title: Evangelion 20 at ANIMAGIC 2009 in Bonn
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 2.0 at ANIMAGIC 2009 in Bonn             Quote Post by Ingraman » Mon May 04, 2009 8:35 am Accordingly with this http//blog.affenheimtheater.de/en/2009/04/30/gurren-lagann-eureka-7-movies-animagic-animotion-2009/ during the convention in Germany (from 31 july to 2 august), the news Eva movie will be screened with english subtitles.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Mon May 04, 2009 9:05 am Awesome. Where's JimmyWolk? I want to remind him of something I said in another thread... http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6368 master_lloyd wrote: Ze Germans haff vays of procuring zeir anime qvuickly.

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Mon May 04, 2009 9:40 am I have read this recently and was like "WTF YES!" allready planning to go to that convention with a friend. btw I live in Berlin :P

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon May 04, 2009 11:56 am Ramiel² wrote: I have read this recently and was like "WTF YES!" allready planning to go to that convention with a friend. btw I live in Berlin :P

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Mon May 04, 2009 12:30 pm Black clouds of envy darken my heart. Well, at least some people in Europe will be able to experience Rebuild 2.0 through the medium of cinema (as it is originally intended).

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon May 04, 2009 1:40 pm Argh, that is awesome. Why oh why can't places in the States get Nice Things like that? If anybody here is able to see the films, let us know how they turned out!

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon May 04, 2009 2:33 pm ^ But don't make it a spoiler-fest. Oh for the love of god please don't!

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Mon May 04, 2009 2:37 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Argh, that is awesome. Why oh why can't places in the States get Nice Things like that? If anybody here is able to see the films, let us know how they turned out!

[]:             Quote Post by Ingraman » Mon May 04, 2009 2:49 pm ^ But don't make it a spoiler-fest. Oh for the love of god please don't!

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon May 04, 2009 2:53 pm Action_Bastard wrote: ^ But don't make it a spoiler-fest. Oh for the love of god please don't!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 04, 2009 3:00 pm ingraman wrote: I fear spoiler-fests will start since june 28....

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon May 04, 2009 3:06 pm I would like to know certain things, though, such as how long the movie is, how many Angels there are, how much screentime each Angel, Mari, Asuka and Kaworu get, etc.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon May 04, 2009 3:37 pm Dartz wrote: Because Germany and Japan have a history of getting on well together...

[]:             Quote Post by The Invincible Shinji » Mon May 04, 2009 4:24 pm People in Europe are so lucky, oh well maybe the fansubbers will be quick to respond.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Mon May 04, 2009 5:17 pm Good! I'll be free at that time if I don't have exams, it'll be a good occasion to go to Germany :)

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon May 04, 2009 6:25 pm Curse my luck. I've worked and been in Europe the past two summers and was in driving distance of where that festival is being held. But will I be in Europe this summer? No. Stupid me had to get a local internship. DAMN!!! Upside is this could mean the powers that be are trying to get 2.0 out to the rest of the world faster than 1.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Mon May 04, 2009 6:37 pm The Invincible Shinji wrote: oh well maybe the fansubbers will be quick to respond.

[]:             Quote Post by CATO » Mon May 04, 2009 7:15 pm Don't forget to bring your cellphones to the screening!

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue May 05, 2009 7:33 am ^ or some HD video cameras.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue May 05, 2009 7:41 am Or just pay off the projectionist and stick a HD camera in the booth and hook the sound directly into the output like a good European pirate does. Oh, and be sure to get it out to the fansub community ASAP.

[]: Evangelion 2.0 at ANIMAGIC 2009 in Bonn             Quote Post by Ingraman » Mon May 04, 2009 8:35 am Accordingly with this http//blog.affenheimtheater.de/en/2009/04/30/gurren-lagann-eureka-7-movies-animagic-animotion-2009/ during the convention in Germany (from 31 july to 2 august), the news Eva movie will be screened with english subtitles.

[]:             Quote Post by master
